name: NVIDIA Corporation
thesisSummary: Training and in-vehicle inference demand scale with fleet software iteration; simulation and validation workloads compound as OEMs and operators expand domains.

name: Mobileye Global Inc.
thesisSummary: Supervised autonomy and REM map economics improve as regulatory clarity and OEM roadmap credibility rise; content per vehicle increases through L2++ rollouts.

name: Allstate Corporation
thesisSummary: Personal auto combined ratio pressure as frequency benefits lag severity and reserve noise; thesis predicated on gradual, not sudden, repricing of driver risk.

name: Ford Motor Company
thesisSummary: Underestimated cyclical and margin drag versus pure-play AV beneficiaries; legacy transformation slower to monetize than fleet-first operators.
